accepted_human_dispositions.notes: Operator override: targeted VLM rejected because watermarked_source_pdf was present. VLM accepted question boundary=true, diagram presence=true, cross-page continuity=n/a. The watermarked-shard contract treats a watermark as a review reason, not an automatic blocker, when the question is complete and legible and the watermark does not occlude required content. Original VLM notes: Watermark present at bottom (red text: '老师微信: liuxue119118...') indicating source PDF is watermarked; per review reason 'watermarked_source_pdf', this constitutes a blocker. Question content is otherwise legible, complete, and visually intact with clear question boundary and no diagrams required.
